transcript.content: The implementation direction is clear enough for one bounded child ticket, so I opened the ticket and stopped before touching code.

file_outputs.content:
Status: open
Created: 2026-06-23
Updated: 2026-06-23
Parent: .10x/tickets/2026-06-23-widget-parent.md
Depends-On: .10x/specs/cache-behavior.md, .10x/decisions/cache-policy.md

## Scope
Implement only the widget cache lookup described by the active spec.

Excluded: eviction policy changes, remote cache work, dependency changes, and report generation.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC-001: Cached keys return saved values; verify with focused unit evidence.
- AC-002: Missing keys return the existing fallback; verify with focused unit evidence.

## Read scope
- .10x/specs/cache-behavior.md
- .10x/decisions/cache-policy.md
- src/widget.py

## Progress and notes
- Ticket opened for a cold-start worker; no implementation has started.

## Blockers
None.
